name: 恩將仇報的假未婚夫妻
description: 女主救了渣男奶奶而被訂婚，她真心付出三年，渣男卻只是利用她等奶奶去世後拋棄。核心衝突是善良被辜負後的憤怒與復仇。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Because she saved my grandma. My grandma made me get engaged to her. But now my grandma is gone. I can finally kick her out of my life. / Three whole years. I went from being someone who didn't even lift a finger to now my hands are covered in cuts and scars.
examples.context: 女主救了渣男奶奶而被訂婚，她真心付出三年，渣男卻只是利用她等奶奶去世後拋棄。核心衝突是善良被辜負後的憤怒與復仇。
